title: phyllanthus minarum
intro: Phyllanthus niruri, commonly known as Phyllanthus minarum, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae, typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and gallbladder disorders, due to its anthraquinone and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Phyllanthus minarum include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can aid in the prevention of diseases such as cancer and Alzheimer's. Phyllanthus minarum is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, which are available in various health food stores and online platforms.
